cases.request: # find TODO comments in typescript files in powershell

# switch immediate child git repos to master in powershell

cases.reference: git branch --merged main | sed '/^[* ]*main$/d' | xargs -r git branch -d

cases.request: # switch to master all branches in sub dirs
cases.reference: for d in */; do [ -e "$d/.git" ] && git -C "$d" switch master; done
